surface.name: Stream videos in five minutes via cURL create asset
surface.selection_basis: The official documentation presents this as the hosted path from account setup to Create a video asset. It reaches the requested first-success boundary without extending into post-success production work.

entry_point.developer_intent: Mux accepts the authenticated cURL request and creates a video asset from the supplied input URL.
assumed_prior_state: The developer has no prior Mux setup for this journey.
The journey starts at account creation and stops at the first documented successful outcome.

documented_first_success.official_milestone: Stream videos in five minutes / create asset
documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: Mux accepts the authenticated cURL request and creates a video asset from the supplied input URL.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: The create-asset response contains an asset ID and asset data; processing begins for the supplied video.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: The official documentation leads the developer to: Create a video asset.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: This is the first observable happy-path result on the selected Stream videos in five minutes via cURL create asset surface; later configuration and production hardening occur after success.

prerequisites.requirement: A Mux access token ID and secret with video permissions.
A publicly reachable video URL accepted by the documented example.

primary_path.action: Create or sign in to Mux and open the dashboard.
primary_path.input: A new developer starting at account creation
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The path cannot continue until this documented requirement succeeds.

primary_path.action: Create or retrieve a Mux access token ID and secret for video.
primary_path.output: Mux Video API credentials are available.
primary_path.success_signal: Mux Video API credentials are available.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The path cannot continue until this documented requirement succeeds.

primary_path.action: Run the documented cURL POST to create an asset from a video URL using HTTP Basic authentication.
primary_path.output: Mux returns an asset object with an ID.
primary_path.success_signal: Mux returns an asset object with an ID.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The path cannot continue until this documented requirement succeeds.

primary_path.action: Confirm that the response contains the newly created asset ID and processing state.
primary_path.output: A Mux asset ID is visible in the successful response.
primary_path.success_signal: A Mux asset ID is visible in the successful response.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The path cannot continue until this documented requirement succeeds.

friction_gates.description: The access token must include permission to create video assets.
Mux must be able to fetch the supplied video URL.

sources.title: Create a video asset
evidence_supported: Mux accepts the authenticated cURL request and creates a video asset from the supplied input URL.
The create-asset response contains an asset ID and asset data; processing begins for the supplied video.

uncertainties.question: Does the current fresh-account UI exactly match every navigation label in the documented Create a video asset path?
uncertainties.impact: Navigation wording may differ while the required outcome and boundary remain the same.
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: The official documentation establishes the journey but account-specific UI state can vary.
